overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a misty forest environment. The character traverses rocky terrain, crosses a wooden rope bridge, and follows a winding dirt path through dense woodland with atmospheric fog and natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverside bank with flowing water

events.description: character turns left away from the river and begins walking uphill
moving from open rocky riverside into enclosed forest trail

agents.ego_description: standing on a rocky outcrop by the river, then turning to walk away from the water into the forest

entered.detail: large gray boulders forming the riverbank where the character stands
fast-flowing water with white rapids visible between rocks
dense forest of tall pine trees rising in the background
patches of white snow on the rocky hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character standing on a rocky riverside outcrop next to a flowing mountain stream. The character turns left and walks away from the water, transitioning from the open rocky bank into a forest trail surrounded by tall conifer trees and patches of snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail leading to wooden rope bridge crossing

events.description: approaching and beginning to cross the wooden suspension bridge over the stream

agents.ego_description: walking along the forest trail and crossing a wooden rope bridge decorated with tribal markers and totems

entered.detail: rickety wooden plank bridge with rope railings spanning the river
colorful fabric banners and carved wooden totems attached to the bridge posts
steep rock face rising beside the bridge approach

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through dense forest, approaching a wooden suspension bridge decorated with tribal totems. The bridge crosses over the mountain stream below, with rocky cliffs visible on the right side as the character traverses the wooden planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest path with mossy boulders and dense undergrowth

events.description: game interface displays 'Discovered Shelter' notification popup

agents.ego_description: traversing rocky terrain and navigating through dense forest undergrowth away from the bridge

entered.detail: large boulders covered in green moss lining the path
dense overhead cover of pine branches creating dappled light
thick clusters of green ferns growing alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, the character continues along a rocky forest path surrounded by moss-covered boulders and dense ferns. The forest canopy creates a sheltered, misty atmosphere. A game notification appears indicating a shelter discovery as the character progresses deeper into the woodland.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching scenic mountain overlook

events.description: forest opens up to reveal panoramic vista of distant mountains and valley fog

agents.ego_description: walking along the forest path toward an open vista with expansive views of the mountain range

entered.detail: break in the forest canopy revealing the overcast sky above
hazy silhouettes of mountains visible through the mist in the distance
gentle hillside covered in grass and low vegetation
fog-filled valley visible between the trees ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a forest trail that gradually opens up to reveal a panoramic vista. The dense canopy gives way to views of a misty valley and distant mountain range, with grassy slopes replacing the rocky terrain as the path leads toward the scenic overlook.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rocky riverside outcrop through a dense, misty forest that eventually opens into a panoramic mountain vista. It begins by moving away from a flowing mountain stream, transitioning from the open rocky bank into a narrow forest trail lined with tall conifers and patches of snow. As the character progresses, the path leads onto a wooden suspension bridge decorated with tribal totems that spans the stream and rocky cliffs before shifting back into a sheltered woodland of moss-covered boulders and dense ferns. The scene then deepens into a misty canopy where a shelter is discovered, before the terrain gradually transforms from rocky ground to grassy slopes. Finally, the dense forest gives way to an expansive overlook, revealing a wide, misty valley and a distant mountain range.
